settings.heading: Order Free Sample
settings.description: Don’t settle for less; become a believer. Order a sample of our 100% pure, natural pozzolan-infused masonry veneer or give us a call to get Creative Mines on your next project.

settings.title: Order Samples
settings.description: We make it easy. Order a sample online today and see firsthand the difference Creative Mines brings to high-design masonry projects.

settings.title: Product Catalog
settings.description: Download our new Source Book showcasing innovative profiles, authentic textures, and hand-crafted artisan color palettes.

settings.title: Seamless Textures
settings.description: Access our seamless textures, 3D patterns, and design features through Architextures. Easily adjust grout colors and installation techniques. Download AutoCAD and Revit files to streamline your workflow.

settings.title: Technical Downloads
settings.description: Access all technical documents, 3 part specification, testing results, installation guidelines and warranty details.

settings.title: Installation Details
settings.description: Creative Mines is an active member of the CMHA and recommends installers follow the MSV Installation Guide and Detailing Options for Compliance with ASTM C1780 standards and best practices.

settings.title: Online CEU Course
settings.description:
Take our online CEU course - The Elegance of Stone in Biophilic Design


Course Description: 
This course offers architects and design professionals a comprehensive understanding of how the elegance of stone can be harnessed within the framework of biophilic design to create environments that prioritize both sustainability and human well-being. We've partnered with Education Ascent to allow easy online access to this course and 1 learning unit.
